data.title: Foothill Gold Line Board maintains leadership in 2026 with Ed Reece as Chair for fourth year and Mendell Thompson as Vice Chair for third year.
data.description: The Board Chair position has been retained by Claremont Vice Mayor Ed Reece for the fourth consecutive year, with Glendora Council Member Mendell Thompson serving as Board Vice Chair for the third year. This decision was announced during the January meeting in MONROVIA, Calif. on January 29, 2026.

data.title: Sprott Physical Copper Trust to list on NYSE Arca, approved by SEC for dual-listing alongside TSX, expanding reach.
data.description: Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., revealed that the Sprott Physical Copper Trust, dedicated to investing in physical copper metal, received approval from the US Securities and Exchange Commission. This approval allows NYSE Arca to list and trade the Trust's units, enabling a dual-listing on both TSX and NYSE Arca. The Trust, under tickers COP.UN and COP.U, will see its Units traded on these platforms following SEC's Rule 19b-4 application approval.

data.title: Chronic Hepatitis D market to grow from 2025-2034 with promising therapies like Brelovitug and Tobevibart + Elebsiran.
data.description: The market for chronic hepatitis D virus is projected to have a consistent growth due to a limited amount of upcoming treatments in the pipeline. Key contenders, like Brelovitug by Bluejay Therapeutics and the Tobevibart + Elebsiran duo by Vir Biotechnology, point towards the sector's potential. These therapies are crucial in addressing the needs of a significant number of patients affected by the disease.

data.title: TNAG Global buys Norman’s Rare Guitars to preserve legacy, expand. Los Angeles-based. #cartervintageguitars.
data.description: In a recent announcement, TNAG Global, the family-owned company known for Nashville’s Carter Vintage Guitars, has confirmed the acquisition of Norman’s Rare Guitars located in Los Angeles. This strategic move marks a significant development in the musical instrument industry as TNAG Global expands its footprint. The acquisition brings together two iconic establishments, solidifying TNAG Global's position in the market. The deal includes the purchase of Norman’s Rare Guitars' entire inventory and assets. Both parties are enthusiastic about this merger, which combines the rich history and expertise of these renowned guitar destinations.

data.title: Vivian Health Co-founder Parth Bhakta becomes Executive Chairman as Bill Kong appointed CEO for AI-driven growth.
data.description: Following the acquisition by IAC, Vivian Health, under the leadership of Co-founder and CEO Parth Bhakta, has achieved profitability and an impressive 50x revenue growth. Transitioning to the role of Executive Chairman, Bhakta appoints Bill Kong as the new CEO. Kong will spearhead Vivian's future growth centered around AI technology. This change in leadership marks a significant moment for the company, as it looks towards expanding and scaling further.

data.title: Jon Taffer expands Taffer's Tavern franchise in Midtown Atlanta, offering elevated tavern classics and craft cocktails.
data.description: A contemporary tavern concept has been introduced in the bustling city of Atlanta, offering a sophisticated twist on traditional tavern dishes and a wide selection of craft cocktails. This endeavor comes from a hospitality expert well-recognized for their work on the popular TV show "Bar Rescue," which has successfully revitalized numerous bars nationwide. The venture aims to bring a fresh dining and drinking experience to the heart of the city. This initiative was launched on January 29, 2026.

data.title: Recordati partners with Moderna for mRNA 3927 to treat Propionic Acidemia globally. Strategic collaboration aims at development and commercialization.
data.description: Recordati has revealed a new partnership with Moderna, where they will collaborate on the development and global commercialization of mRNA 3927. This compound is targeted at treating propionic acidemia. The collaboration aims to leverage both companies' expertise to bring this treatment to the market on a global scale. This strategic partnership signifies a significant step towards advancing the treatment options available for patients with propionic acidemia.

data.title: SiriusPoint to redeem 8 million 8.00% Resettable Fixed Rate Preference Shares, Series B on Feb 26, 2026 at $25.49 per share.
data.description: Bermuda-based insurer and reinsurer, SiriusPoint Ltd. declared its decision to redeem all 8 million of its 8.00% Resettable Fixed Rate Preference Shares, Series B on February 26, 2026. The redemption price is set at $25.00 per share, along with an additional $0.49 representing unpaid cumulative dividends up to the Redemption Date. This action equates to a total Redemption Price for the shares. SiriusPoint, listed on NYSE as SPNT, is a prominent player in the global specialty insurance sector.

data.title: KLA Corp. (NASDAQ: KLAC) shares drop after releasing Q2 earnings. Earnings per share: $8.85. Quarterly revenue: $3.3 billion.
data.description: Shares of KLA Corp. (NASDAQ: KLAC) dipped in after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its second-quarter earnings report. The company reported earnings of $8.85 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $8.80, as reported by Benzinga Pro. Additionally, KLA recorded quarterly revenue of $3.3 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus. For more information, refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story. Keep an eye on KLAC stock for further price movements.

data.title: Investor rights law firm urges Block, Inc. shareholders to discuss their rights regarding possible breaches by officers. Contact immediately. (Numbers: Jan. 29, 2026, NY, NYSE:XYZ)
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly reach out to the company as time may be running out to assert their rights. On January 29, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, announced an inquiry into potential breaches by specific officers and directors at Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ). It is crucial for shareholders to act swiftly to determine and safeguard their interests.

data.title: i-80 Gold adds Ronald Butler Jr., Michael Jalonen, and Steven Yopps to board as independent directors. Effective Feb 1, 2026.
data.description: In a recent development, i-80 Gold Corp. revealed the addition of Ronald Butler Jr., Michael Jalonen, and Steven Yopps to its Board as independent directors, with their term commencing on February 1, 2026. This move comes as i-80 Gold Corp. aims to strengthen its governance structure. The company, listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol IAU and the NYSE American as IAUX, is welcoming the new appointments as part of its ongoing efforts to enhance its leadership team. The trio of directors are set to bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the boardroom, further solidifying i-80 Gold Corp.'s position in the market.

data.title: Shareholders of ASP Isotopes Inc. urged to contact Halper Sadeh LLC to discuss rights. Investigation on officers and directors.
data.description: Investors are urged to get in touch with the company promptly as there might be a restricted timeframe to uphold your rights. In New York on January 29, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm focusing on investor rights, is looking into potential breaches by specific officers and directors of ASP Isotopes Inc. (NASDAQ: ASPI). Contact the firm for further details and possible actions.

data.title: Investor rights firm urges WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. shareholders to discuss rights with possible limited time left to enforce.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly reach out to the company due to a pressing deadline to uphold their rights. On January 29, 2026, a prominent investor rights law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, announced an inquiry into the actions of specific executives and board members at WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. (NASDAQ: WBTN) to determine potential misconduct. Shareholders are urged to take swift action given the impending circumstances surrounding this investigation.
